# Website.md

Website.md is an open convention for AI-operable websites.

The core claim: the website editor is disappearing. WEBSITE.md tells an AI coding agent how to build, edit, preview, validate, and publish a website.

Important files:

- WEBSITE.md: website structure, canonical URLs, content sources, editing rules, preview, validation, and publishing.
- DESIGN.md: visual system and taste.
- COPY.md: voice and messaging.
- SEO.md: URL, metadata, search, and AI discovery rules.
- AGENTS.md: repository-wide agent behavior.
